title: plant.json — global plant settings
description: Global plant identity and simulation settings. Shape only; relational checks live in plant_validator.gd.

$schema.description: Editor hint; ignored by the engine.

plant_id.description: Snake-case ID matching the directory name under config/plants/.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI.

default_dt_s.description: Fixed simulation tick duration [s]. Defaults to 1.0 when absent. Speed multipliers scale accumulated time, never dt.
